title: Beat Saber Music Pack UX Design

title: Marriott Vacation Club UX Redesign
description: Led UX transformation of a Fortune 500 vacation ownership platform, targeting a 40% mobile conversion gap across a multi-brand system reaching millions of members

title: ZzzQuil Sleep App UX Design
description: Redesigned a P&G sleep app's color system so the brand's iconic purple palette functioned effectively on screens at 11pm, not just on pharmacy shelves

title: Grounded Climate Summit UX Design
description: Applied behavioral research on emotional regulation to redesign a climate platform's communication architecture, driving a 300% increase in webinar registrations

title: Malibu Rum 101 Days Campaign Design
description: Built the creative system for a 101-day, 60M-impression Malibu Rum campaign across multiple agencies, three platforms, and 4 international markets

title: Carrabba's Italian Grill Content UX Design
description: Designed a culinary content platform for a national restaurant chain that reduced time-to-recipe by 40% and grew mobile session depth 28%

title: Disney Public Affairs UX Redesign
description: Redesigned Walt Disney World's Public Affairs digital platform, cutting site-wide exit rates 44% and reducing a failing 5-step donation flow to 2 steps with 100% post-launch task success

title: Taco Bueno Brand & UX Strategy
description: Built 'Bueno Means Better' from a single user research insight into a fully integrated brand platform that drove 147% higher social engagement and measurable perception gains in 3 test markets
